logs.message: ALERT: Earthquake detected in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia!
COMMANDER: Deploying regional KaijuGuard response fleet to Kuala Lumpur epicenter.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-KUA-1 responding to tactical alert in Kuala Lumpur.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-KUA-2 responding to tactical alert in Kuala Lumpur.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-KUA-3 responding to tactical alert in Kuala Lumpur.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-KUA-4 responding to tactical alert in Kuala Lumpur.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-KUA-5 responding to tactical alert in Kuala Lumpur.
[LOCAL SWARM] Unit DR-MA-KUA-6 responding to tactical alert in Kuala Lumpur.
COMMANDER: Swarm-intelligence algorithms managing 6 local units.

summary.text: All active drones have been assigned missions: DR-MA-KUA-1 is en route to perform a thermal scan, drop medical supplies, deploy a mesh network, and analyze structural integrity.

logs.message: [COMMAND] detect_survivors assigned to DR-MA-KUA-1 queue. Will execute upon arrival.
[COMMAND] drop_payload assigned to DR-MA-KUA-1 queue. Will execute upon arrival.
[COMMAND] deploy_mesh assigned to DR-MA-KUA-1 queue. Will execute upon arrival.
[COMMAND] structural_scan assigned to DR-MA-KUA-1 queue. Will execute upon arrival.
CRITICAL: Drone DR-MA-KUA-2 communication lost. Probable structural entanglement or crash.

summary.text: All active drones have been assigned missions. DR-MA-KUA-1 has been dispatched to coordinates (50, 50) for a thermal scan, followed by dropping medical supplies and deploying a mesh network. It will then proceed to (60, 60) to analyze structural integrity.
